entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A structured group of people with a particular purpose, such as a company, institution, or association.

entity_types.name: Award
entity_types.description: A prize or honor bestowed for achievement.

entity_types.name: Publication
entity_types.description: A work published for public distribution, such as a book, paper, or biography.

entity_types.name: ScientificConcept
entity_types.description: A fundamental idea or principle in science.

entity_types.name: EducationalInstitution
entity_types.description: An organization dedicated to education, such as a university or gymnasium.

entity_types.name: ResearchInstitute
entity_types.description: An organization dedicated to scientific research.

entity_types.name: Material
entity_types.description: A substance or mixture of substances, especially one that has a particular use or quality.

relation_groups.name: Personal and Professional Relationships
relation_groups.description: Describes various relationships between individuals and their affiliations with organizations.

relations.name: born_in
relations.detail: Indicates the place of birth for a person.

relations.name: married_to
relations.detail: Indicates a marital relationship between two people.

relations.name: employed_by
relations.detail: Indicates that a person works for an organization.

relations.name: studied_at
relations.detail: Indicates where a person received education.

relations.name: collaborates_with
relations.detail: Indicates a working partnership between individuals.

relation_groups.name: Achievements and Recognition
relation_groups.description: Captures instances of individuals receiving awards or honors for their contributions.

relations.name: received
relations.detail: Indicates that a person was given an award.

relations.name: awarded_by
relations.detail: Indicates the organization that bestows an award.

relation_groups.name: Research and Discovery
relation_groups.description: Focuses on the scientific work, discoveries, and publications of individuals and organizations.

relations.name: conducted_research_on
relations.detail: Indicates the subject of a person's research.

relations.name: discovered
relations.detail: Indicates a scientific discovery made by a person.

relations.name: published
relations.detail: Indicates a publication authored by a person.

relations.name: develops
relations.detail: Indicates a scientific concept or technology developed by a person.

relation_groups.name: Organizational Operations
relation_groups.description: Describes the establishment and activities of organizations, particularly research and educational institutions.

relations.name: founded
relations.detail: Indicates that a person established an organization.

relations.name: located_in
relations.detail: Indicates the geographical location of an organization.

relations.name: supports
relations.detail: Indicates an organization provides support to a research institute.

relation_groups.name: Material Properties and Usage
relation_groups.description: Describes the characteristics and applications of various materials, particularly in scientific contexts.

relations.name: has_property
relations.detail: Indicates a scientific property associated with a material.

relations.name: used_in
relations.detail: Indicates a scientific concept or application where a material is used.
